prompt: A realistic handheld smartphone photo of a young adult woman shopping in a modern grocery store produce section at night, framed vertically from upper thighs to head in a close, slightly wide-angle perspective. She is holding an open cardboard egg carton toward the camera with exactly 6 visible brown eggs inside, creating a casual candid shopping moment. She has dark brown shoulder-length hair, a light warm skin tone, and is wearing a fitted monochrome brown outfit: a ribbed long-sleeve zip-front crop top with the zipper partially open at the chest, and matching high-waisted brown pants. The pose is confident and natural, torso angled slightly toward the camera, one arm presenting the egg carton and the other near the cart handle. Use dramatic supermarket lighting with bright highlights from the refrigerated cases, shallow depth of field, realistic skin texture, realistic fabric folds, subtle lens distortion from a phone camera, and high-detail commercial lifestyle photography. Keep the mood candid, fashionable, and urban, with the outfit color customizable as brown, the item in hand customizable as open carton of eggs, the store type customizable as upscale grocery store produce aisle, and the camera style customizable as handheld smartphone photo.
